name: Muffins, Morning Glory
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray 18 muffin cups with non-stick spray.
2. In a large bowl, combine the oil, yogurt, apple juice concentrate, pineapple juice, egg white and vanilla. Mix well.
3. Add the flour, granulated fructose, baking powder, soda and salt. Mix again.
4. Fold in the crushed pineapple with juice and grated carrots.
5. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
